prompts.text: Explain to a new direct report what 'managing up' actually means.

Explain to the board why you're restructuring without using the word 'synergies'.
Explain to the all-hands what 'cost discipline' actually means for their jobs.

Your strongest direct report is bored and circling LinkedIn. Talk about it.
Your team's one-on-ones are skipped half the time. Address it.

Promoting your top IC vs hiring an external manager.
Coaching your peer privately vs raising it with the CEO.
Quarterly OKRs vs continuous goal-setting for your team.
Letting a struggling report figure it out vs stepping in.

Telling the team the truth about runway vs softening it.
Stepping up to defend the strategy vs letting the CEO take the hit.
Doing a layoff in one cut vs a slow-bleed of attrition over a year.
